highlight.header: Blood clots, sweat, and lots of tears
highlight.header2: We are all diamonds in the rough 💎
highlight.point1: DBTSY finished first or second in every batting CAT, and threw in a first in K/BB to top it off.
highlight.point2: It wasn't a historical year... only three records were broken from the past 2 years. Dirty Birds ERA (w13, 1.07), Fire Sale K/9 (w9, 12.05), and the Manfred Man QS (w7, 12)
highlight.point3: Yearly Best: DBSTY 6 Batting Cats, Fire Sale (SV/H, K/9), Baseball (ERA, WHIP), Manfred Man (W, QS) 100 each, Dirty Birds (RBI), Peaches (K/BB), Dingers (HR) tied at 220.
